notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes plunked
notableEvents.detail: Rays challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Nick Fortes hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to shortstop Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Junior Caminero to 3rd. Ryan Vilade out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.
